patch.value:
Expose the Plan item type and `pm plan` workflow through agent-facing integration surfaces.

Scope:
- Update SDK contracts and MCP/tool schemas so agents can discover Plan support and dedicated plan actions without reading full help text.
- Update Codex and Claude plugin assets so slash commands/skills use `pm plan` rather than ad-hoc planner docs once the command exists.
- Update docs/help/examples with progressive-disclosure recipes for agent harnesses.
- Add dogfood coverage that creates a Plan, adds steps, links related/dependency pm items, approves/materializes selected steps, and verifies search/readback.

Agent harness examples required:
- Codex-style: create a self-contained Plan with progress, decisions, validation, and resume context; update steps as implementation proceeds.
- Claude-style: read-only planning before approval; TaskCreate/TaskUpdate equivalent mapping to Plan steps.
- Cursor-style: codebase research, clarifying questions, file path/code references, editable steps, and saved future context.

Output and documentation requirements:
- Help should make `pm plan` the shortest path for agents needing durable plans.
- Contracts should expose flags and JSON shapes for all `pm plan` subcommands.
- MCP should surface plan actions with compact schema descriptions and deterministic response fields.
- Plugin docs must avoid implying `Plan` is only a Claude/Codex artifact; it is a pm-native item type.
- Dogfood should assert low-token `pm plan show --fields` output and search discoverability.

Acceptance:
- SDK/MCP/plugin/help/docs surfaces all mention Plan and `pm plan` consistently.
- Packed CLI smoke or package-first dogfood covers the workflow.
- Future agents can discover usage via `pm contracts`, `pm help`, plugin slash commands, and search.
Expose Plan workflow in SDK, MCP, plugins, docs, and dogfood
Sync Plan item type and pm plan commands across agent-facing contracts, plugins, documentation, and isolated dogfood validation.

SDK contracts, MCP schemas, help/docs, Codex/Claude plugin assets, and dogfood all cover Plan and pm plan; examples map Codex/Claude/Cursor planning styles to pm-native Plan items; packed/dogfood validation proves discovery and readback.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Child task created from pm-v7dj. This slice follows the core Plan type and pm plan command implementation so external contracts do not get ahead of runtime behavior.

value.note: Claude planner command should adopt pm plan
Claude planner skill should adopt pm plan
existing planner command docs to migrate
existing planner skill docs to migrate
Codex plugin Plan workflow docs target

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Research evidence: external surfaces must make Plan discoverable to agents through contracts, MCP, plugin commands/skills, docs, and dogfood. Linked SDK/MCP/plugin/docs files and focused regression command for future work.

patch.value: Plan workflow exposed in SDK cli-contracts (PLAN_FLAG_CONTRACTS + plan tool action schema), MCP server (pm_plan tool + plan action routing + instructions), Codex/Claude planner docs/skills, docs/COMMANDS.md + docs/AGENT_GUIDE.md, and dogfood-package-first.mjs (Plan lifecycle assertions). pm contracts --command plan --flags-only returns full flag list; pm plan registered as a top-level command; MCP pm_plan operational end-to-end.
All agent-facing surfaces now expose Plan: SDK contracts, MCP pm_plan tool, Codex/Claude plugin docs, docs/COMMANDS.md + AGENT_GUIDE.md, dogfood lifecycle assertions.
Plan workflow discoverable via contracts, MCP, plugin assets, docs.
Verified: pm contracts --command plan --flags-only returns full flag list; pm_plan tool callable through pm-mcp; dogfood-package-first.mjs adds 12 new plan-related assertions that pass.
